The honest economics of fix-and-flip tech

by Regan Cooney · Apr 21, 2026

The grey zone between buy-price and list-price is where the real money sits.

This post walks through evaluating a £50 pallet of iPhones, the iFixit-grade repair call, and the listing geometry that preserves margin.

For a one-operator shop, the tooling has to be honest: what breaks, how much to fix, what it clears.
